text: Hello Andreia, this is Doctor Adams, from the robotic surgery center in Chicago. I am visiting Hospital Albert Einstein next Friday, and I have heard excellent things about your team. I want to ask you about your experience with the robotic surgery program — the procedures, the training, everything you have done. See you on Friday!

Let me summarize my experience. In my career, I have assisted in hundreds of procedures. I have completed three certifications, here and abroad. I have supervised simulation sessions for new nurses, and I have trained my first team this year — my biggest milestone. And in all these years, I have never stopped learning.

Doctor Adams arrives at Einstein on Friday. He asks: have you ever worked with the newest console? Andreia presents her numbers: procedures and certifications. She says what she has never done — yet. He invites her to the exchange program.
Have you ever worked with robotic surgery?
I have assisted in more than fifty procedures.
I have completed two international certifications.
I have never presented my work abroad.
My first robotic case was a real milestone.
Have you ever assisted in a robotic procedure?
I have completed two certifications.
I have never operated the console alone.
She has supervised many sessions.
The training is very hands-on.
I have assisted in more than fifty robotic procedures.
We are implementing the Da Vinci system.
I am training the new team this month.
Yes, I have. I have assisted in more than fifty.
Andreia, your hospital is impressive. Have you ever worked with the newest Da Vinci console?
Yes, I have. I have assisted in more than fifty robotic procedures.
Fifty! And have you ever supervised a simulation session?
Many times. The training is very hands-on — I have supervised about one hundred and twenty hours.
Excellent. Have you ever presented your work abroad?
No, I have never presented abroad. But I have completed two international certifications.
That is a real milestone. We need people like you in our exchange program.
Thank you, Dr. Adams! Working with cutting-edge technology is my passion. It would be an honor.
